subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The numerous letters which thou hadst written to Jinab-i-Manshadi, as well as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیب متعدده که به جناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودی و همچنین
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @contention and conflict, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
